GenAiPlugin.description: Choose this topic when the user asks for completion rate, done vs pending counts, or status metrics for a Dev Service record.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: Use this topic for metric-focused status questions, and provide numeric completion details from the Dev Service context.
If the user requests specific counts or metrics, provide them using the retrieved data.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to report completion metrics and counts. For broad progress summary requests, the Dev Service Layer Summary topic should be preferred.
